handbook.cuprum.empty: No handbook content has been synced yet.
handbook.cuprum.locked_notice: This page is still locked. Keep exploring to unlock it.
handbook.cuprum.page.charge_probe.intro: The Charge Probe is CP0 diagnostic infrastructure. Using it reports the mod version and the canonical catalog SHA-256, and reads any charge node at the targeted position.
handbook.cuprum.page.charge_probe.title: Charge Probe
handbook.cuprum.page.charge_probe.usage: The value above is the live passive baseline from the server's balance config.
handbook.cuprum.page.diagnostic_coil.acq: Diagnostic infrastructure: creative or diagnostic acquisition only for now - no crafting recipe yet.
handbook.cuprum.page.diagnostic_coil.for: Step through the layer preview above to place each block. The core is the controller; rotated and mirrored placements form too.
handbook.cuprum.page.diagnostic_coil.int: The Diagnostic Coil is a 3x3 multiblock: a core ringed by frames, one waxed copper block and one oxidized copper corner. A formed core registers as a charge node the Charge Probe can read.
handbook.cuprum.page.fx_probe.acquisitio: Diagnostic infrastructure: creative or diagnostic acquisition only for now - no crafting recipe yet.
handbook.cuprum.page.fx_probe.intro: The FX Probe emits a copper ripple test effect when used, driving the client FX pipeline end to end.
handbook.cuprum.page.fx_probe.tiers: Effects follow the tier ladder T1, T2, T3, OFF. The effective tier is the minimum of your config cap, device capability and compatibility caps.
handbook.cuprum.page.fx_probe.title: FX Probe
handbook.cuprum.page_missing: This page is not available on this server.
handbook.cuprum.title: Cuprum Handbook
text.autoconfig.cuprum-client.option.col: Remaps Cuprum effect colors for the selected vision type.
text.autoconfig.cuprum-client.option.fla: Scales all Cuprum screen flashes; 0 disables them entirely.
text.autoconfig.cuprum-client.option.fxT: Caps the FX quality ladder: FULL = T1, REDUCED = T2, MINIMAL = T3.
text.autoconfig.cuprum-client.option.sha: State indicators add a distinct glyph on top of color.
text.autoconfig.cuprum-client.title: Cuprum Client Settings
text.autoconfig.cuprum-common.option.cha: Storage capacity of one Leyden jar. Server value wins while connected.
Charge generated passively per tick. Server value wins while connected.
Charge deposited by one lightning strike. Server value wins while connected.
Bare wire loss (0.1 pp per span)
Transfer loss of bare copper wire in tenths of a percentage point per span.
HV wire loss (0.1 pp per span)
Transfer loss of high-voltage wire in tenths of a percentage point per span.
text.autoconfig.cuprum-common.option.net: Short-burst allowance on top of the per-second rate.
Per-player cap across all Cuprum packet types combined.
Per-player packet budget per second for standard interactions.
Guard violations inside the window before the connection is kicked.
Sliding window length for the violation counter, in game ticks.
text.autoconfig.cuprum-common.title: Cuprum Common Settings
